title: Excellent ANC
text: Noise cancelling is excellent on flights and the sound is balanced.

title: Great for work
text: Bluetooth connection is stable and battery lasts all week.

title: Budget winner
text: Very affordable headphones with surprisingly good ANC for the price.

title: Big bass
text: The speaker is waterproof and loud enough for outdoor parties.

title: Accurate gaming mouse
text: The gaming mouse feels fast and accurate, and the battery lasts for months.

title: Good budget gaming mouse
text: Simple gaming mouse with reliable clicks and comfortable shape.

title: Perfect portable monitor
text: USB-C works with my laptop and the portable monitor is bright enough for travel.

title: Dead pixel and battery problem
text: The monitor had a dead pixel and my connected phone battery drained quickly. Very disappointed.

title: Battery problem while charging
text: This charger cable caused a battery problem on my tablet and stopped fast charging after a week.

title: Battery drain problem
text: Portable monitor works but the USB-C connection creates a battery drain problem on my laptop.

title: Great mechanical keyboard
text: The mechanical keyboard feels premium and Bluetooth switching is reliable.

title: Loud but responsive
text: Mechanical keyboard is great for gaming and the RGB lighting looks clean.
